name: The Three Brothers' Bond (Pirate Foil)
effect_text: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Sabo], [Portgas.D.Ace], or [Monkey.D.Luffy] with a cost of 5 or less and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.[Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.
